recipes.title: Airliners
recipes.methodText:
The purpose of this recipe is to calculate the cost of one chicken
breast generated from a whole chicken for use in other recipes
calling for an Airliner breast. Here is the total calcuation:

Unit:Pound

Notes:"Half of one 4.5 lb chicken yields one 8 oz airliner
breast."

recipes.title: Bordelasie Sauce

ingredients.raw: 1 Bottle Lapis Luna Cabernet Sauvi- gnon
8 Ounce Shallots, Fresh, (1 large or 2 medium shallots)
ingredients.item: Shallots, Fresh, (1 large or 2 medium shallots)

ingredients.raw: 0.2 Ounce Spice, Thyme Ground, (or ½ teaspoon fresh thyme)
ingredients.item: Spice, Thyme Ground, (or ½ teaspoon fresh thyme)

recipes.methodText:
To a small saucepan, add wine, shallots, thyme, and bay leaf.
Bring to a boil over medium heat and cook until the mixture
reduces by half, about 10 minutes.
Add the broth and bring to a boil again. Continue cooking until
this mixture reduces by half, 15-20 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer and discard the
solids. Return the strained sauce to the saucepan and heat over
medium-low heat.
In a small bowl, combine the melted butter and flour until
smooth. Add this mixture to the saucepan and whisk until thick-
ened. Enjoy immediately.

recipes.title: Brown Gravy

ingredients.raw: 2 Quart Tap Water, I use unsalted
4 Tablespoon Butter, Unsalted, I use un- salted and add salt as needed
ingredients.item: Butter, Unsalted, I use un- salted and add salt as needed

ingredients.raw: 1 Teaspoon Spice, Pepper Black Ground, (or more to taste)
ingredients.item: Spice, Pepper Black Ground, (or more to taste)

recipes.methodText:
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the butter and let it melt.
Once the butter is melted, add in the all-purpose flour and
whisk until smooth. You want it to cook out the raw flour taste.
Allow the flour mixture to cook for about 3 minutes, whisking
occasionally to keep it smooth.
Gradually add in the beef broth, whisking constantly. Pouring it
in slowly will allow it to thicken. I like to add in about 1 cup at a
time.
Once all of the beef broth has been added, season with black
pepper. Taste test before adding salt. The amount of salt you'll
want to use will be determined by whether or not you use salted
beef broth and/or salted butter.
Once your gravy is seasoned, serve in a gravy boat over your
favorite dish!

recipes.title: Mashed Potatoes - Batch
recipes.equipment: Large Whisk, 12 qt. Pot, Third Pan Deep,
recipes.methodText:
Select 15 Idaho potatoes and peel.
Cut each in half and put into 12 qt. pot.
Fill with water to just above line of potatoes.
Place on stove on high heat. Add several heavy pinches of
salt.
Bring to a boil and let simmer until a fork easily passes through
potatoes. Drain in large colander.
Return drained potatoes to large pot and turn on low heat.
In small sauce pan heat 1/2 lb butter, 1/2 cup cream, two table-
spoons of chopped garlic, one sprig Rosemary and three sprigs
of Thyme until butter is fully melted and well seasoned.
Strain butter to remove herbs.
Add cream and butter to potatoes and stir with whisk until
potatoes are smooth and creamy.
Pour into deep third pan.

recipes.title: PREP - Bacon Jam
recipes.methodText:
Cook bacon in Oven until crispy.
Run cooked Bacon through Robocoop for 45 seconds.
in a bowl mix maple, Apple cider vinegar, chili powder, brown
sugar, salt and pepper .
Sautee one Yellow onion, and a tablespoon of Garlic. until
translucent. add Maple mixture, then add bacon. cook for 3
minutes. Let cool Quart up.

oughly. Ensure all ingredients are evenly spread. Pour into

recipes.title: PREP - Caramelized Onions
recipes.methodText:
Slice 10 yellow onions with mandolin
Use thin setting and slice across side to side half moon
shaped.
Place all slices into large round saute pan
Add 2 tablespoons of oil, pinch of salt and pepper
When onions begin to become transparent, add 4 oz of butter
Melt all together until onions just begin to brown
Remove from heat and let cool
methodLines: Use thin setting and slice across side to side half moon
Place all slices into large round saute pan
Add 2 tablespoons of oil, pinch of salt and pepper
When onions begin to become transparent, add 4 oz of butter
Melt all together until onions just begin to brown
Remove from heat and let cool

recipes.title: PREP - Cowboy Butter
recipes.equipment: Rubber Head Spatula, 2 Qt. Metal Mixing Bowl

ingredients.raw: 0.25 Tea- spoon Spice, Pepper Black Ground
ingredients.item: Tea- spoon Spice, Pepper Black Ground

recipes.methodText:
Allow 1lb of butter to soften and add to bowl
Add 1 teaspoon crushed red pepper
Add 3 cloves garlic minced
Add 3 Tablespoons finely Italian seasoning
Add 1 Tablespoon chopped Thyme leaves
Add 1/2 Teaspoon Smoked Paprika
Add the zest of one full lemon
Add 1 Tablespoon of lemon juice
Add 1/2 Teaspoon kosher salt
Add 1/4 Teaspoon ground black pepper
Add 2 Tbsp Dijon mustard
Stir and mix thoroughly so all ingredients are evenly spread
through the butter mixture
Roll a sheet of plastic wrap out flat
Scrape the bowl with spatula and form a long "log" of the butter
mixture onto the plastic wrap
Roll the plastic wrap around the butter log and twist the ends
to seal
Date, label and put Cowboy Butter Roll into fridge
methodLines: Allow 1lb of butter to soften and add to bowl
Add the zest of one full lemon
Stir and mix thoroughly so all ingredients are evenly spread
Roll a sheet of plastic wrap out flat
Scrape the bowl with spatula and form a long "log" of the butter
Roll the plastic wrap around the butter log and twist the ends
Date, label and put Cowboy Butter Roll into fridge

recipes.title: PREP - Creme Brulee
recipes.equipment: 10 qt. Pot, 4 Qt. Metal Mixing Bowl, Ho-
recipes.methodText:
Pour 2 quarts of cream into 10 qt. Pot
Add 1 Tbspn Vanilla Bean Powder (or scraped inner powder
from 2 dried vanilla beans)
Apply medium heat stirring frequently to bring to 190 F
Bubbles should begin to form around the edge of the pot
DON'T LET THE LIQUID RISE TO A BOIL
Remove from heat and allow to cool for 2 minutes
Separate 12 egg yolks (keeping yolks and discarding whites)
and place yolks into large metal mixing bowl
Add two whole eggs and 1 cup of sugar to the egg yolks
Add the warm cream mixture slowly to the bowl and mix gently
with a small whisk
Mix until combined thoroughly
Pour into 14 round bowls (see equipment) and place each into
a hotel pan
Pour water between bowls into hotel pan until water line is half
way up the sides of the round bowls
Cover the entire hotel pan with aluminum foil
Bake at 350 F for 50 minutes
Remove from oven and release the foil from the sides to allow
the cream to ventilate
Once completely cooled and set, wrap each individual Creme
Brulee and label and date

recipes.title: PREP - Drunkenberry Sauce

ingredients.raw: 1 Fluid OunceGran Gala Triple Orange Liqueur
ingredients.item: Fluid OunceGran Gala Triple Orange Liqueur

recipes.methodText:
Add 1 qt frozen berries and 4 tablespoons butter to sauce pan
and simmer on low heat until melted and well mixed
Add one shot Grand Gala and one shot of Palma
Add 1/2 cup brown sugar
Place in blender and blend for 1 - 2 minutes until smooth
Let cool
Pour into one full squeeze bottle and the remainder into a quart
container

recipes.title: PREP - Mango Chicken Salad
recipes.methodText:
Chop and Put all ingredients in a large metal mixing bowl and
mix thoroughly.
Add mixture to the Food processor and pulse for 30 seconds
to a minute just until broken down.
YOU DONT WANT A PASTE CONSISTANCY.
Put mixture into large Cambro and label with date and name.

recipes.title: PREP - Pesto
recipes.equipment: Robot Coupe, Rubber Head Spatula, Quart Container
recipes.methodText:
Put 2 cups of packed fresh basil leaves and 2 cups spinach into
Robo Coupe
Add 2 tablespoons of chopped fresh garlic
Add 1 1/2 cup slivered almonds
Add 2 tablespoons lemon juice
Add 2 cups of grated parmesan cheese
Turn on Robo Coupe and blend thoroughly
While Robo Coupe is running, gradually pour the olive oil
slowly until completely mixed and pasty
Scrape into a quart container and label and date
